allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
PowerShell(where.exe python 2>$null; where.exe python3 2>$null; where.exe py 2>$null; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { Test-Path "$_\\python.exe" })
Bash(find /c/Users/xiyan.fu/AppData/Local -name "python.exe" -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null | grep -v WindowsApps | head -5; find /c/ProgramData -name "python.exe" -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null | head -3)
